Drivers for battery, display, flash, heart rate monitor, IMU, microphone, PMIC, touch, and various microcontroller components, with interfaces for accelerometer, ambient light, backlight, button, I2C, LED, MPU, OTP, PWM, QSPI, RTC, SPI, UART, vibration, voltage monitoring, and watchdog functions.

## Folders
- **[battery](battery/README.md)**: Battery voltage monitoring, management functions, and USB connection detection for Pebble firmware.
- **[display](display/README.md)**: Driver and management functions for ICE40LP and Sharp LS013B7DH01 displays, with display driver header.
- **[flash](flash/README.md)**: Drivers and functions for managing various flash memory operations, including initialization, read, write, erase, and protection.
- **[fpc_pinstrap](fpc_pinstrap/README.md)**: Reads and interprets pinstrap values using GPIO configurations for the Pebble firmware.
- **[hrm](hrm/README.md)**: Driver and header for AS7000 heart rate monitor, plus documentation for AMS AS7000 SoC.
- **[imu](imu/README.md)**: Drivers and initialization files for various IMU components, including accelerometers and magnetometers.
- **[legacy](legacy/README.md)**: Functions and utilities for managing accelerometer operations, including sampling and data handling.
- **[mic](mic/README.md)**: Manages microphone commands and data reading with HDLC framing.
- **[nrf5](nrf5/README.md)**: Button handling, debouncing, EXTI emulation, GPIO, I2C, PWM, QSPI, RTC, SPI, UART, and watchdog drivers for nRF5.
- **[pmic](pmic/README.md)**: Driver implementations for AS3701B, MAX14690, and nPM1300 PMICs with power management and I2C functions.
- **[qemu](qemu/README.md)**: QEMU drivers and utilities for accelerometer, battery, serial communication, settings, and touch sensor.
- **[stm32f2](stm32f2/README.md)**: Drivers and configurations for STM32F2 microcontrollers, including DMA, GPIO, I2C, SPI, UART, and power management.
- **[stm32f4](stm32f4/README.md)**: GPIO initialization, power management, RTC, and temperature sensor drivers for STM32F4.
- **[stm32f412](stm32f4/README.md12)**: Driver implementations for QSPI communication and voltage monitoring on STM32F412 microcontrollers.
- **[stm32f7](stm32f7/README.md)**: I2C, PWM, power management, and UART drivers and definitions for STM32F7.
- **[stubs](stubs/README.md)**: Stub functions for various hardware components including accelerometer, ambient light, backlight, battery, buttons, display, GPIO, I2C, MCU, OTP, peripherals, power, QSPI, RNG, temperature, UART, vibration, voltage monitor, and watchdog.
- **[touch](touch/README.md)**: Driver for the eWD1000 touch controller and touch sensor initialization in Pebble firmware.

## Files
- **[accel.h](accel.h.md)**: Interface for an accelerometer driver, including functions for sampling, shake, and double tap detection.
- **[accessory.c](accessory.c.md)**: Manages accessory communication via UART, including power control, data transmission, and bus contention handling.
- **[accessory.h](accessory.h.md)**: Header file for managing accessory port operations, including initialization, data transmission, and baud rate settings.
- **[ambient_light.c](ambient_light.c.md)**: Manages ambient light sensor initialization, control, and light level measurement.
- **[ambient_light.h](ambient_light.h.md)**: Header file for managing ambient light sensor operations and light level conversions.
- **[ambient_light_opt3001.c](ambient_light_opt3001.c.md)**: Driver for the OPT3001 ambient light sensor, including initialization, reading, and threshold management.
- **[backlight.c](backlight.c.md)**: Controls the backlight functionality using PWM, GPIO, and I2C interfaces with adjustable brightness.
- **[backlight.h](backlight.h.md)**: Header file for backlight control, including initialization, brightness setting, and LED enabling.
- **[battery.h](battery/README.md.h)**: Header file for battery management functions, including initialization, voltage monitoring, and charge control.
- **[button.c](button.c.md)**: Button driver implementation for initialization, state checking, and command handling in firmware.
- **[button.h](button.h.md)**: Functions for initializing buttons, checking if a button is pressed, and performing a self-test.
- **[button_id.h](button_id.h.md)**: Defines an enumeration for button ID values used in handling button input.
- **[clocksource.h](clocksource.h.md)**: Functions to configure and manage the 32 kHz LSE clock and its output on pin MCO1.
- **[debounced_button.c](debounced_button.c.md)**: Implements debouncing logic for button inputs using a timer and interrupt service routines.
- **[debounced_button.h](debounced_button.h.md)**: Initializes a debounced button in the Pebble firmware.
- **[dma.h](dma.h.md)**: Defines functions and handlers for initializing, starting, stopping, and monitoring DMA transfers.
- **[exti.h](exti.h.md)**: Header file for configuring and managing external interrupts (EXTI) and NVIC settings.
- **[exti.inl.h](exti.inl.h.md)**: Inline helper functions for enabling and disabling external interrupts.
- **[flash.h](flash/README.md.h)**: Header file for flash memory operations, including initialization, read/write, erase, and power management functions.
- **[fpc_pinstrap.h](fpc_pinstrap/README.md.h)**: API to read pinstrap values for FPC version identification on the main PCB.
- **[gpio.h](gpio.h.md)**: Header file for GPIO configuration and management, including initialization, input/output settings, and power optimization.
- **[hrm.h](hrm/README.md.h)**: Functions to initialize, enable, disable, and check the status of a heart rate monitor device.
- **[i2c.c](i2c.c.md)**: I2C driver implementation for managing I2C bus operations, including initialization, data transfer, and error handling.
- **[i2c.h](i2c.h.md)**: I2C bus management functions for reading and writing registers and blocks with slave devices.
- **[i2c_definitions.h](i2c_definitions.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for I2C communication, including transfer events and bus state.
- **[i2c_hal.h](i2c_hal.h.md)**: I2C hardware abstraction layer functions for initialization, enabling, disabling, and transfer control.
- **[imu.h](imu/README.md.h)**: Functions for initializing, powering, and testing IMU devices in different modes.
- **[led_controller.c](led_controller.c.md)**: Controls LED operations including initialization, brightness, and RGB color settings via I2C.
- **[led_controller.h](led_controller.h.md)**: Header file for LED control, defining color constants and functions for initialization and color management.
- **[mag.h](mag.h.md)**: Header file for managing 3-axis magnetometer data, including functions for usage, sampling, and data reading.
- **[mcu.h](mcu.h.md)**: Functions for retrieving the MCU serial number and converting CPU cycles to milliseconds.
- **[mcu_reboot_reason.h](mcu_reboot_reason.h.md)**: Defines the McuRebootReason structure to track various microcontroller reset causes.
- **[mic.h](mic/README.md.h)**: Header file for microphone driver initialization, volume control, start/stop functions, and status check.
- **[mpu.c](mpu.c.md)**: Manages MPU regions, including enabling, disabling, and configuring memory access permissions.
- **[mpu.h](mpu.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for managing MPU regions and cache policies in firmware.
- **[otp.h](otp.h.md)**: Defines OTP slot enumerations and functions for reading, writing, and locking OTP data for various platforms.
- **[periph_config.h](periph_config.h.md)**: Functions for initializing, locking, enabling, and disabling peripheral configurations.
- **[pmic.h](pmic/README.md.h)**: Functions for initializing and controlling the PMIC, including power management and battery monitoring.
- **[pwm.h](pwm.h.md)**: Functions for initializing, setting duty cycle, and enabling PWM in the Pebble firmware.
- **[pwr.h](pwr.h.md)**: Header file for power management functions, including wakeup, flash power down, and backup domain access.
- **[qspi.h](qspi.h.md)**: Header file for QSPI controller operations, including read/write functions and memory-mapped mode.
- **[qspi_definitions.h](qspi_definitions.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for QSPI port configuration and initialization.
- **[README.md](README.md.md)**: Instructions to read driver coding guidelines on Confluence before editing or writing drivers.
- **[rng.h](rng.h.md)**: Generates a 32-bit random number using STM32 and returns success status.
- **[rtc.h](rtc.h.md)**: RTC driver interface for initialization, calibration, time management, alarms, and timezone handling.
- **[rtc_common.c](rtc_common.c.md)**: Functions for managing real-time clock (RTC) time, timezone settings, and backup registers.
- **[rtc_private.h](rtc_private.h.md)**: Private functions for initializing and configuring RTC drivers on STM32 platforms.
- **[spi.h](spi.h.md)**: Header file for SPI slave port interface, providing high and low-level APIs for SPI communication.
- **[spi_dma.h](spi_dma.h.md)**: Functions to enable or disable TX/RX DMA and control SPI device state for a given device.
- **[system_flash.h](system_flash.h.md)**: Defines flash memory sector addresses and provides functions to erase, write, and read flash memory.
- **[task_watchdog.c](task_watchdog.c.md)**: Implements a task watchdog for Pebble firmware to monitor and manage task execution and system stability.
- **[task_watchdog.h](task_watchdog.h.md)**: Functions and definitions for managing task watchdogs in a FreeRTOS-based system.
- **[temperature.h](temperature.h.md)**: Defines a temperature sensor structure and functions to initialize and read temperature in millidegrees-C.
- **[timer.h](timer.h.md)**: Defines a function to find the prescaler for a timer configuration based on a given frequency.
- **[uart.h](uart.h.md)**: UART driver interface for initialization, configuration, and data transmission with interrupt handling.
- **[vibe.c](vibe.c.md)**: Controls and manages the vibration motor using PWM, including initialization, strength setting, and analytics.
- **[vibe.h](vibe.h.md)**: Header file for controlling vibration motor strength and state in firmware.
- **[vibe_drv2604.c](vibe_drv2604.c.md)**: Driver implementation for the DRV2604 haptic motor controller, including initialization and control functions.
- **[voltage_monitor.h](voltage_monitor.h.md)**: Header file for voltage monitoring on various microcontroller platforms, defining structures and functions.
- **[watchdog.h](watchdog.h.md)**: Watchdog driver interface for initialization, starting, feeding, and checking reset flags.
- **[wscript_build](wscript_build.md)**: Build script for configuring and compiling various hardware drivers based on microcontroller family and board type.
